name: agentos-workspace
description: Use AgentOS as a safe workspace runtime for AI coding tasks.

interface.longDescription: AgentOS Workspace helps Codex use copied project workspaces, review packages, approval gates, and approved sync instead of editing host projects directly.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentOS to safely edit this project.
Create an AgentOS session and review changes.
Work in AgentOS and wait before syncing.
